headline: Today's top AI story: Meta and Anthropic in talks for up to $10bn data centre deal
bullets: Meta and Anthropic in talks for up to $10bn data centre deal
Anthropic slashes Claude Fable 5 limits in Max and Team Premium and pushes Pro users toward API pricing
Analysis: recent open weight models lag frontier closed models' cyber capabilities by 4 to 7 months, a narrower gap than the 6 to 10 months through most of 2025 (AI Security Institute)
Abbott probes two cyber incidents amid extortion claims
